creator: wilko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

On which version FreeBSD did you try this? Any chance you can try a 
4.0R bootflop (or put the card in a machine running 4.0) to see if it is 
still not 
recognised? You might also want to try the 'dc' driver, as the  
man page lists "o   NetGear FA310-TX Rev. D1, D2 or D3 (PNIC 82c169)". 
I don't have a NetGear card to test so it might help if you could give it  
a shot.
